title: RFTools Builder
description: RFTools addon mod adding the builder, shield system and much more
body:
# RFTools Builder
RFTools Builder is an addon for [RFTools Base](https://modrinth.com/mod/rftools-base) which adds the builder (and all the shape cards) and the shield system. This mod is intended to be used together with [RFTools Power](https://modrinth.com/mod/rftools-power) and depends on [RFTools Base](https://modrinth.com/mod/rftools-base) and [McJtyLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcjtylib).

![RFTools Builder blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e0IclJLr/images/e44e13277d6670709d6e3fd3ec9d76aa7a6b9254.png)

## Modpacks
Feel free to use this mod in any modpack.
